title: dryopteris drakei
intro: Dryopteris drakei, also known as Drake's fern or autumn fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant is native to the southeastern United States and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris drakei include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. Dryopteris drakei is commonly prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions.
